_meta.note: Comparator labels are external reference labels only. They are NEVER BN training targets.

low.justification: Direct ordinal alignment: WOE low = BN low (both indicate minimal ecological concern)

negligible.justification: WOE negligible maps to BN low per governance spec Section 7.2 (both indicate no significant risk)

moderate.justification: Direct ordinal alignment: WOE moderate = BN moderate

moderate-to-high.justification: Conservative mapping per governance spec Section 7.2: WOE moderate-to-high maps to BN high

high.justification: Direct ordinal alignment: WOE high = BN high
